subcodes.first_line: O My Persian friends! The sweet-spoken letter, like the clouds of Bahman, showered forth the rain of meanings and pearls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسی من نامه خوش سخن مانند ابر بهمن ریزش باران معانی نمود و گوهر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster
